metadata.name: PCBWay (standard multilayer)
metadata.process_notes: Standard-process defaults for PCBWay's standard multilayer capability window (process tier: standard multilayer, 1oz copper, FR-4). Numbers are published standard-process values (min trace/space 4 mil / 0.1 mm with a 3.5 mil / 0.09 mm absolute floor, min via drill 0.15 mm / min finished hole 0.20 mm, min annular ring 0.13 mm, aspect ratio 8:1) and MUST be confirmed against PCBWay's current capabilities datasheet before relied upon. high_speed_si checks remain enabled because PCBWay offers controlled-impedance service on multilayer builds.
